caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with bold text on it. The setting appears to be a casual studio environment, decorated with numerous framed photographs on the wall behind him, which seem to capture various moments and people. To his right, there is a mannequin dressed in a white shirt and black pants, and further back, racks of clothing suggest that this might be a multi-purpose space, possibly a clothing store or a boutique that also hosts podcasts. The man is engaged in conversation, gesturing with his hands as he speaks, indicating an animated discussion or interview.
